quote_of_day.text: China. Shows body discovery of 25 year old young woman who died as the result of erotic asphyxiation. Worked as a medical nurse and online model. Lubricated vibrator was found lying at her feet. Her va-ginal and an-al passages had the same lubricant in them.
quote_of_day.name: Anon

guest_letters.title: Send your articles to the East of Indus newspaper
guest_letters.body: By adding the prefix !eastofindus to your post, and writing your title after that, you can send an article through induschan, which will be published on iac and displayed in the next edition of the newspaper, in the morning or the evening! There is no censorship, there is quality control, and there is a 50 word minimum, send your writing!!!
guest_letters.name: India Abstract Culture

articles.title: Weather for Indus today
articles.body:
A low-pressure system of erotic asphyxiation cases moved into the board, bringing with it a chill of morbid fascination. Anon shared a case from Italy, where a 24-year-old Onlyfans and PornHub model died during a livestream.

A scattered high-pressure front of speculation rolled in, with Anon pondering the genetic component to sexual preferences. The discussion turned to whether a genetic factor could explain individual differences in sexual orientation.

Meanwhile, a brief but intense downpour of social awkwardness occurred, as Anon sought friends and discussed social interactions with a simple 'I NEED FRENSS.' A separate, eerie calm settled over a notice about a RAW agent meeting an anon, marked by an unsettling, giant 6'4 burly man greeting an anon at their door.

articles.title: Erotic asphyxiation cases shared on imageboard
articles.body:
Anon opened a thread on the imageboard with a post about a 24-year-old Onlyfans and PornHub erotic gay model from Italy who died during a livestream.

The model was using a high-quality pirated VPN, which delayed the discovery of his location and corpse by at least 24 hours.

Another anon shared a case from a 2004 German Forensic Medicine textbook about a 24-year-old man who intentionally caused the death of his 28-year-old gay partner during a strangulation fetish session.

The 24-year-old was acting as a safe spotter but encouraged his partner to push the session further, leading to the partner's death.

A different anon described a case of a 23-year-old woman who died while engaging in erotic asphyxiation with her male partner as a spotter.

The partner waited too long to intervene, leaving her hanging for an entire minute while he masturbated, and she died from a heart attack.

Other anons shared more cases, including an 18-year-old man who streamed his own death on an erotic platform after a viewer requested he masturbate while hanging himself. The teenager used a bed sheet as a makeshift rope and died during the stream.

Anons discussed the possible reasons behind the arousal some people experience from hanging or strangulation, with one suggesting that the brain deprived of blood can create a hallucinogenic effect leading to powerful orgasms.

Another anon noted that people may get addicted to this fetish like a drug addiction.

Some anons expressed discomfort with the thread, with one stating that hanging videos make them uncomfortable to watch, while another found the thread to be painful and difficult to read.

The thread also included a discussion on how people discover their affinity for autoerotic asphyxiation, with one anon suggesting that it may be induced by past traumas or behavior.

Another anon questioned how people can develop a taste for such fetishes, asking how "horny one gotta be to like acquire a taste for such fetishes".

The thread contained graphic descriptions of various cases, and some anons found it disturbing or uncomfortable to read.

articles.title: Anon Ponders Genetic Component to Sexual Preferences
articles.body:
Anon opened the discussion by questioning whether his sexual preferences were innate or influenced by external factors.

He wondered if there was a genetic component to his desires, citing the example of South Indian men who, despite equal exposure to pornography, rarely develop certain preferences.

Another anon responded by suggesting that the intensity of the poster's emotions and desires seemed to be rooted in deeper psychological or physiological factors.

This respondent acknowledged the complexity of the poster's feelings and the possibility that they could be influenced by a combination of genetic and environmental factors. One respondent brought up the topic of interracial relationships and the use of large penis sizes in pornography.

Anon described a specific type of pornographic content and noted that some women become 'feral' in such scenarios.

A user named Stag chimed in with a list of requirements for a bull, or a man who would engage in a specific type of sexual activity with Stag's wife.

Stag emphasized his dominance in the relationship and outlined physical and performance criteria for the bull. The discussion continued with various anons sharing their thoughts on the topics of cuckoldry, stag culture, and interracial relationships.

One anon distinguished between 'stag' and 'cuck' cultures, with the former involving dominant men who use bulls as sex toys for their wives and the latter involving humiliation.

The conversation also touched on specific examples of violent or extreme sexual acts, including a case where a porn star allegedly broke his penis during a performance.

Anons discussed the realism of such scenarios and the physical capabilities of men from different racial backgrounds. Throughout the discussion, anons used explicit language and made references to graphic sexual content.

The conversation remained focused on the poster's initial question, exploring the complexities of human desire and the factors that influence it.

articles.title: Anon Sparks Discussion with 'Gobarida Edition' Remark
articles.body:
An anonymous poster sparked a discussion with a brief remark: 'Gobarida edition.' The original poster's comment drew several responses from other users seeking clarification on what 'Gobarida Edition' referred to.

One respondent suggested it might relate to biogas or renewable energy, while another considered it could be a term related to a book, publication, or cultural reference. However, the conversation quickly diverged into unrelated topics.

One user began discussing the concept of robo-waifus and their hypothetical characteristics. Another poster expressed frustration with the job market and education system, mentioning that one has to give 'gajillion memejams' to get a desirable job or college admission.

The topic of waifus continued with one user lamenting the lack of 'real robo waifu' and settling for 'used up, ran through 3D Randis.' This remark garnered responses about the perceived decline in societal values and the idealization of certain caste groups.

The conversation also touched on sensitive topics like varna sankar and social hierarchy. Some users discussed their preferences for interacting with individuals from specific backgrounds, while others critiqued these views.

Throughout the discussion, posters used colloquial language and slang, reflecting a casual and often humorous tone. The conversation lacked a clear resolution or central theme, instead meandering through various topics and personal opinions.

articles.title: Anon Seeks Friends, Discusses Social Interactions
articles.body:
Anon opened the thread saying they need friends. One respondent suggested starting with interactions with women they find unattractive to gain experience. Another poster shared their approach to social interactions, recommending analyzing the situation and the listener to build confidence.

A different anon expressed frustration with their current social life, stating their existing interactions with women feel unfulfilling.

Some anons discussed strategies for improving social skills and finding potential partners, while others shared personal struggles with social interactions and feelings of inadequacy.

articles.title: RAW Agent Meets Anon
articles.body:
Anon described a scenario where a 6'4 burly man, claiming to be from the R&AW digital investigation wing, knocks on their door on a quiet Saturday afternoon.

The man stated it was a private matter and he wasn't in trouble. The burly man took Anon outside to his car and sat in the front passenger seat, accompanied by a regular-looking man in the driver's seat.

They mentioned possibly having a reward for Anon's cooperation. Anon 'Yui' shared more details, including a supposed connection between the board owner 'dayush' and an external entity, with some users funding the construction of a lodge in Ladakh.

Another poster mentioned 'dyaush' creating G.O.B.A.R, a Gujarati organization, for encrypted communication.
